business_categories.name: All Businesses
business_categories.description: Browse all member businesses across every category in the local association directory.

business_categories.name: Restaurants & Cafes
business_categories.description: Local restaurants, cafes, and eateries offering breakfast, lunch, dinner, and takeout options.

business_categories.name: Marketing & Advertising
business_categories.description: Agencies and consultants providing marketing strategy, digital advertising, branding, and related services.

business_categories.name: Retail
business_categories.description: Shops and stores selling consumer goods, apparel, gifts, and specialty products.

business_categories.name: Professional Services
business_categories.description: Accountants, legal services, consultants, and other professional service providers.

deal_categories.name: All Deals
deal_categories.description: All current discounts and coupons from local member businesses.

deal_categories.name: Retail
deal_categories.description: In-store and online retail offers, including apparel, gifts, electronics, and more.

deal_categories.name: Restaurants & Dining
deal_categories.description: Meal discounts, happy hour specials, and dining promotions.

deal_categories.name: Services
deal_categories.description: Discounts on professional, home, and personal services from local providers.

leadership_profiles.bio: Maria Lopez has led the Downtown Business Association since 2018, focusing on small business advocacy, placemaking, and community partnerships.
Danielle Carter recruits, trains, and supports community volunteers for festivals, networking events, and outreach programs.
Jonathan oversees the association’s event calendar, including monthly networking breakfasts, training workshops, and the Annual Gala.
Priya supports current and prospective members with applications, renewals, and benefits education.
Samuel manages digital communications, social media, and promotional campaigns for member businesses and association programs.

membership_plans.name: Business Solo
membership_plans.description: Ideal for solo entrepreneurs and single-member businesses looking to access core association benefits.

membership_plans.name: Business Starter (1–5 Employees) - Monthly
membership_plans.description: Affordable entry-level plan for small teams, including directory listing and event discounts.

membership_plans.name: Business Small Team (3–10 Employees) - Monthly
membership_plans.description: Designed for growing businesses that need visibility, promotion, and team access to events.

membership_plans.name: Business Starter (1–5 Employees) - Annual
membership_plans.description: Save on dues by paying annually; includes online directory listing and access to member-only resources.

membership_plans.name: Business Standard (5–20 Employees) - Annual
membership_plans.description: Comprehensive benefits for established businesses, including enhanced directory placement and multi-staff access.

membership_plans.name: Business Growth (21–50 Employees) - Annual
membership_plans.description: For growing companies that want more promotional opportunities, sponsorship discounts, and advocacy support.

membership_plans.name: Business Enterprise (51–200 Employees) - Annual
membership_plans.description: Premium plan for large employers with expanded visibility, custom partnership options, and priority support.

membership_plans.name: Event Supporter
membership_plans.description: One-time business membership tied to a single signature event, ideal for sponsors and short-term participants.

membership_plans.name: Nonprofit Basic (1–10 Staff) - Annual
membership_plans.description: Discounted membership for small nonprofits, including directory listing and eligibility for grant-related programs.

membership_plans.name: Nonprofit Plus (11–50 Staff) - Annual
membership_plans.description: Expanded benefits for larger nonprofit organizations with additional promotional opportunities.

membership_plans.name: Individual Professional - Annual
membership_plans.description: For consultants and independent professionals who want access to networking events and resources without a business listing.

membership_plans.name: Student / Emerging Professional - Annual
membership_plans.description: Reduced-rate membership for students and emerging professionals exploring careers in business and entrepreneurship.

navigation_links.description: Homepage of the local business association
Browse upcoming events and networking opportunities
Access guides and resources for local businesses
Browse discounts and coupons from member businesses
View jobs or post a new job listing
Learn about the association and its leadership
Contact the association with questions or inquiries
Get in touch with the association
View open positions or post a job
Access your comparison list, reading list, and saved deals

resource_categories.name: All Resources
resource_categories.description: All guides, toolkits, templates, and reference materials in the resource library.

resource_categories.name: Marketing & Promotion
resource_categories.description: Resources to help promote your business, including social media, email marketing, branding, and advertising.

resource_categories.description: Guides on budgeting, cash flow, taxes, bookkeeping, and financial planning for small businesses.

resource_categories.name: Operations & Management
resource_categories.description: Best practices for staffing, workflow, customer service, and day-to-day business operations.

businesses.name: Sunrise Breakfast & Brunch

businesses.name: City Center Pizza

businesses.name: Little Oaxaca Taqueria
businesses.description: Colorful taqueria serving tacos, bowls, and aguas frescas with fast, affordable lunch combos.

businesses.name: BrightPath Marketing Co.
businesses.description: Boutique marketing consultancy specializing in digital strategy, content marketing, and small business growth.

businesses.name: OuterRing Creative Studio

resources.title: Social Media Strategy Blueprint for Local Businesses
resources.summary: A step-by-step guide to building a social media strategy that drives foot traffic and online sales for local businesses.
resources.content: This guide walks through defining goals, choosing platforms, creating a content calendar, and measuring results for small business social media marketing...
resources.author: Samuel Green

resources.title: Instagram Reels for Retailers: A 30-Day Social Media Content Plan
resources.summary: Daily prompts and examples to help retail shop owners create engaging Reels that showcase products and promotions.
resources.content: Over the next 30 days, you will plan and publish a series of Instagram Reels designed to highlight new arrivals, in-store experiences, and promotions...
resources.author: Samuel Green

resources.title: Social Media Advertising on a Budget
resources.summary: Learn how to create effective paid social campaigns on Facebook and Instagram without overspending.
resources.content: Paid social media advertising can be affordable when you focus on narrow targeting, simple creative, and clear calls to action...
resources.author: Maria Lopez

resources.title: Getting Started with Social Media Marketing
resources.summary: An introductory guide for business owners new to social media platforms and content creation.
resources.content: If you are just getting started with social media marketing, this guide will help you choose platforms, set up profiles, and post your first updates...
resources.author: Samuel Green

resources.title: Email Marketing Basics for Busy Owners
resources.summary: How to launch an email newsletter that keeps customers informed and coming back.
resources.content: Email marketing remains one of the highest-ROI channels for small businesses. This guide covers list building, selecting a platform, and writing your first email...
resources.author: Samuel Green

resources.title: Local SEO Guide for Brick-and-Mortar Shops
resources.summary: Improve your chances of showing up when nearby customers search for your products and services.
resources.content: Local search optimization helps you appear in map results and nearby searches. This guide explains Google Business Profiles, reviews, and on-page SEO basics...
resources.author: Priya Desai

resources.title: Holiday Campaign Planning Workbook
resources.summary: A printable workbook to plan your promotions, content, and events for the holiday season.
resources.content: Use this workbook to map out key dates, offers, budgets, and marketing channels for your holiday campaigns...
resources.author: Samuel Green

resources.title: Small Business Branding Guide
resources.summary: Clarify your visual identity, voice, and brand story to stand out from competitors.
resources.content: Branding is more than a logo. This guide walks through defining your brand promise, visual elements, and messaging framework...
resources.author: Maria Lopez

resources.title: Budgeting 101 for New Businesses
resources.summary: Learn how to create a simple, realistic budget for your first year in business.
resources.content: A basic budget helps you anticipate expenses and set revenue targets. This guide introduces budgeting templates and forecasting tips...
resources.author: River City Accounting Group

resources.title: Managing Cash Flow in Seasonal Retail
resources.summary: Strategies for retailers who experience big swings in revenue across the year.
resources.content: Seasonal businesses face unique cash flow challenges. This guide explains how to plan inventory, manage expenses, and build reserves...
resources.author: River City Accounting Group

resources.title: Tax Deductions Cheat Sheet for Retailers
resources.summary: A quick-reference list of common deductible expenses for retail businesses.
resources.content: From cost of goods sold to marketing expenses, this cheat sheet highlights deductions to discuss with your tax professional...
resources.author: River City Accounting Group

resources.title: Hiring Your First Employee: A Compliance Checklist
resources.summary: Step-by-step checklist covering paperwork, onboarding, and policies for your first hire.
resources.content: Before bringing on your first employee, you need to register for payroll, set up workers' comp, and draft basic policies...
resources.author: Harbor Legal Associates

resources.title: Standard Operating Procedures Template
resources.summary: A fill-in-the-blank template to document key processes in your business.
resources.content: Use this SOP template to capture repeatable steps for tasks like opening/closing, cash handling, and customer service...
resources.author: Downtown Business Association

resources.title: Customer Service Playbook for Frontline Staff
resources.summary: Training resource to help staff handle common customer situations and complaints.
resources.content: Empower your team with scripts, principles, and scenarios that define great customer service in your business...
resources.author: Jonathan Kim

resources.title: Choosing the Right POS System for Your Store
resources.summary: Key features and questions to consider when selecting a point-of-sale system.
resources.content: Your POS system affects inventory, reporting, and customer experience. This guide compares popular options and outlines a decision checklist...
resources.author: Downtown Business Association

deals.title: Spring Style Event – 20% Off All Apparel
deals.description: Refresh your wardrobe with 20% off all full-price apparel and accessories at Sample Retail LLC.
deals.terms: Valid on in-store purchases only. Excludes clearance items and gift cards. Cannot be combined with other offers.

deals.title: 15% Off Laptop Upgrades & Accessories
deals.description: Save 15% on laptop upgrades, docking stations, and essential accessories for your small business.
deals.terms: Discount applies to select models and accessories. In-store only. Limit 3 discounted items per customer.

deals.title: 18% Off Eco-Friendly Kitchen Essentials
deals.description: Get 18% off bamboo utensils, reusable storage, and compostable kitchen products at Greenleaf Home Goods.
deals.terms: Valid on marked eco-friendly kitchen items. While supplies last. No rain checks.

deals.title: 40% Off Winter Clearance
deals.description: Deep discounts on remaining winter apparel at Sample Retail LLC.
deals.terms: All clearance items are final sale. Limited sizes and styles.

deals.title: Lunch Combo: Sandwich, Chips & Drink for $9.99
deals.description: Choose any classic sandwich, a bag of chips, and a fountain drink for a special lunch price.
deals.terms: Available Monday–Friday, 11am–2pm. No substitutions on drink size.

deals.title: BOGO 50% Off Ramen Bowls
deals.description: Buy one signature ramen bowl and get the second of equal or lesser value for 50% off.
deals.terms: Dine-in only. Discount applies to the lower-priced bowl. Not valid with other promotions.

deals.title: 15% Off Midweek Brunch
deals.description: Enjoy 15% off your entire brunch bill at Sunrise Breakfast & Brunch every Tuesday–Thursday.
deals.terms: Valid on food and non-alcoholic beverages only. One discount per table.

deals.title: Family Night: 2 Large Pizzas for $24.99
deals.description: Feed the family with two-topping large pizzas at a special bundle price.
deals.terms: Carryout or delivery. Delivery fees and taxes not included.

deals.title: Free 30-Minute Marketing Audit + 20% Off First Project
deals.description: Book a complimentary marketing audit with BrightPath Marketing and receive 20% off your first paid project.
deals.terms: Offer applies to new clients only. Minimum project value of $500 required for discount.

deals.title: 25% Off Campaign Setup Fee
deals.description: Launch your first paid social campaign with 25% off Skyline Digital Ads’ one-time setup fee.
deals.terms: New clients only. Ongoing monthly management billed separately.

deals.title: Intro Personal Training Package – 3 Sessions for $120
deals.description: Try Metro Fitness Studio with three 60-minute personal training sessions at a reduced package price.
deals.terms: Limit one intro package per person. Sessions must be used within 60 days of purchase.

deals.title: 15% Off Rack Cards & Flyers
deals.description: Promote your business with professionally printed rack cards and flyers at 15% off regular print prices.
deals.terms: Discount applies to print services only. Design services billed separately.

deals.title: Member Exclusive: 10% Off Storewide
deals.description: Show your Downtown Business Association membership card and receive 10% off your entire purchase.
deals.terms: Valid for association members only. Cannot be combined with other Greenleaf promotions.

events.title: March Morning Meetup
events.description: Kick off your month with coffee and informal networking with fellow downtown business owners.

events.title: Coffee & Connections
events.description: A casual morning networking session featuring member spotlights and open networking.

events.title: Lunch Leads Exchange
events.description: Structured networking over lunch with facilitated lead exchanges and introductions.

events.title: Spring After-Hours Mixer
events.description: Evening mixer with appetizers, a cash bar, and plenty of time to build new connections.

events.title: Small Business Breakfast Roundtable
events.description: Facilitated roundtable discussions on hiring, marketing, and cash flow over breakfast.

events.title: April Morning Meetup
events.description: Monthly morning meetup focused on peer problem solving and sharing upcoming promotions.

events.title: 2026 Annual Gala & Business Awards
events.description: Black-tie gala featuring a plated dinner, live entertainment, and the annual business excellence awards.

events.title: Social Media Bootcamp for Local Retailers
events.description: Hands-on workshop covering Instagram, Facebook, and TikTok strategies tailored to brick-and-mortar retailers.

events.title: Finance Clinic: Managing Cash Flow in Seasonal Businesses
events.description: A practical seminar with local CPAs on forecasting, budgeting, and managing cash flow swings.

events.title: Volunteer Orientation & Training
events.description: Orientation session for new volunteers supporting upcoming events, including the Annual Gala and street festivals.

events.title: Spring Fundraiser Brunch
events.description: A community brunch fundraiser supporting small business grants and downtown beautification projects.

events.title: Holiday Business Social
events.description: End-of-year social with light bites, music, and networking to celebrate member accomplishments.

sponsorship_packages.name: Community Supporter
sponsorship_packages.description: Entry-level gala sponsorship ideal for small businesses seeking visibility in event promotions.

sponsorship_packages.name: Silver Partner
sponsorship_packages.description: Mid-tier sponsorship with logo placement and additional recognition during the program.

sponsorship_packages.name: Gold Partner
sponsorship_packages.description: Premium sponsorship with expanded recognition and prominent logo placement.

sponsorship_packages.name: Table Host
sponsorship_packages.description: Host a reserved table for your guests with name recognition in the program.

sponsorship_packages.name: Presenting Sponsor
sponsorship_packages.description: Top-level sponsorship with category exclusivity and maximum brand exposure.

sponsorship_packages.name: Table Sponsor
sponsorship_packages.description: Sponsor a table at the Spring Fundraiser Brunch and host your guests.

sponsorship_packages.name: Neighborhood Supporter
sponsorship_packages.description: Support the brunch fundraiser with recognition in print and digital materials.

sponsorship_packages.name: Session Sponsor
sponsorship_packages.description: Sponsor the Social Media Bootcamp session and reach local retailers focused on marketing.

sponsorship_packages.name: Coffee Partner
sponsorship_packages.description: Provide coffee and light refreshments for the April Morning Meetup.
benefits: Opportunity to place brochures on registration table
